title: Baroness Swinburne - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State in the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Independent consultancy and commissions  Baroness Swinburne received advice on taking up a commission with Nationwide Building Society, under her independent consultancy Swinburne Ltd.  This advice was considered and provided by ACOBA before it closed on 12 October 2025. The Independent Adviser has not had a role in determining this advice.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Baroness Swinburne before its closure. "
